content.full_text:
February 5, 1991

Mr. Wayne Imberi  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 "J" Street, #600  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Imberi:

Pursuant to our conversation today, I’m writing this letter to formally request a written response to the following question.

A candidate running for City Council has requested I provide him political consulting services. That same candidate is owed money by another entity that I own, unrelated to the consulting business. Since I will be compensated for the consulting services that will be provided, I wanted to know if the candidate can credit those fees against what is owed to him. Please comment on how to properly report that transaction.

Should you have any questions, please let me know.

Very truly,

R & L CONSULTING GROUP

DAVE ROSS  
President

DR/ksq
